title: abarema tetraphylla
intro: Abarema tetraphylla, also known as the White Guanacaste or Tachire, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Abarema tetraphylla include treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as digestive problems. Abarema tetraphylla can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, decoctions, and infusions, which are typically used to treat these conditions.
